description: 👍 Are you looking for a great newborn baby clothes gift for your little one ? This cute unisex baby onesie is 100% organic cotton made, and is soft, comfortable and breathable, perfect for baby's delicate skin. Available in 3 different sizes suitable for baby aged 0-9 months. The cute little bear patterns on the onesie also make your baby look more adorable and fun ! 💖 Specifications: 1. Material: 100% cotton. 2. Style: Unisex for boys and girls. 3. Closure: Snap buttons and side lace ties. 4. Pattern: Non-fade embroidered bear pattern. 5. Size: 0-3 Months, 3-6 Months, 6-9 Months available. 6. Drying method: Can be air dried naturally or tumble dried. 7. Cleaning Method: Can be hand washed or machine washed. 8. Package Includes: 1 Pc x Unisex Baby Grow Onesie for boy and girl. ✅ Baby Outfit Size Chart: ✨ Size: 0-3 Months, Clothes Length: 18.8" , Bust: 19.6" , Sleeve Length: 8.4" , Suggest Baby Height: 20.4" - 23.2" . ✨ Size: 3-6 Months, Clothes Length: 20.1" , Bust: 20.4" , Sleeve Length: 9.0" , Suggest Baby Height: 23.6" - 26.7" . ✨ Size: 6-9 Months, Clothes Length: 22.1" , Bust: 21.2" , Sleeve Length: 10" , Suggest Baby Height: 25.9" - 28.7" . ❓ FAQ: 1. Can this baby clothes be dried in a tumble dryer ? Answer: Yes, this newborn clothes can be both air dried naturally or tumble dried. 2. Why is the care label on the outside of the baby outfit ? Answer: Inside no label humanized design, more comfortable for baby to wear without itchiness. 💖 Note: Due to manual measurement, would you please kindly allow 1 to 3 cm error, please make sure you don't mind before you buy. Thank you !
